segments.text: They say, ‘If a man puts away his wife, and she goes from him, and becomes another man’s, should he return to her again?’ Wouldn’t that land be greatly polluted? But you have played the prostitute with many lovers; yet return again to me,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.

Lift up your eyes to the bare heights, and see! Where have you not been lain with? You have sat waiting for them by the road, as an Arabian in the wilderness. You have polluted the land with your prostitution and with your wickedness.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore the showers have been withheld and there has been no latter rain; yet you have had a prostitute’s forehead and you refused to be ashamed.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Will you not from this time cry to me, ‘My Father, you are the guide of my youth!’?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “‘Will he retain his anger forever? Will he keep it to the end?’ Behold, you have spoken and have done evil things, and have had your way.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Moreover, Yahweh said to me in the days of Josiah the king,
Have you seen that which backsliding Israel has done? She has gone up on every high mountain and under every green tree, and has played the prostitute there.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I said after she had done all these things, ‘She will return to me;’ but she didn’t return, and her treacherous sister Judah saw it.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I saw when, for this very cause, that backsliding Israel had committed adultery, I had put her away and given her a certificate of divorce, yet treacherous Judah, her sister, had no fear, but she also went and played the prostitute.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Because she took her prostitution lightly, the land was polluted, and she committed adultery with stones and with wood.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Yet for all this her treacherous sister, Judah, has not returned to me with her whole heart, but only in pretense,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Yahweh said to me,
Backsliding Israel has shown herself more righteous than treacherous Judah.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Go, and proclaim these words toward the north, and say, ‘Return, you backsliding Israel,’ says Yahweh; ‘I will not look in anger on you, for I am merciful,’ says Yahweh. ‘I will not keep anger forever.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Only acknowledge your iniquity, that you have transgressed against Yahweh your God, and have scattered your ways to the strangers under every green tree, and you have not obeyed my voice,’
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
Return, backsliding children,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,
for I am a husband to you. I will take one of you from a city, and two from a family, and I will bring you to Zion.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I will give you shepherds according to my heart, who will feed you with knowledge and understanding.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: It will come to pass, when you are multiplied and increased in the land in those days,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,
they will no longer say, ‘the ark of Yahweh’s covenant!’ It will not come to mind. They won’t remember it. They won’t miss it, nor will another be made.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: At that time they will call Jerusalem ‘Yahweh’s Throne;’ and all the nations will be gathered to it, to Yahweh’s name, to Jerusalem. They will no longer walk after the stubbornness of their evil heart.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: In those days the house of Judah will walk with the house of Israel, and they will come together out of the land of the north to the land that I gave for an inheritance to your fathers.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “But I said, ‘How I desire to put you among the children, and give you a pleasant land, a goodly heritage of the armies of the nations!’ and I said, ‘You shall call me “My Father
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: and shall not turn away from following me.’
Surely as a wife treacherously departs from her husband, so you have dealt treacherously with me, house of Israel,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
A voice is heard on the bare heights, the weeping and the petitions of the children of Israel; because they have perverted their way, they have forgotten Yahweh their God.
Return, you backsliding children, and I will heal your backsliding.
Behold, we have come to you; for you are Yahweh our God.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Truly help from the hills, the tumult on the mountains, is in vain. Truly the salvation of Israel is in Yahweh our God.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: But the shameful thing has devoured the labor of our fathers from our youth, their flocks and their herds, their sons and their daughters.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Let us lie down in our shame, and let our confusion cover us; for we have sinned against Yahweh our God, we and our fathers, from our youth even to this day. We have not obeyed Yahweh our God’s voice.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
